style: STAR format — Situation, Task, Action, Result
leadership_principles: Strive to be Earth's Best Employer

questions.question: Tell me about a time you had to make a decision without having all the information you needed.
questions.tip: Show you can move fast with calculated risk. Quantify the outcome.

questions.question: Describe a situation where you took ownership of a problem that wasn't technically your responsibility.
Tell me about a time you disagreed with a team decision. What did you do?
questions.tip: Show respectful pushback followed by full commitment once decision was made.

questions.question: Give me an example of a time you improved a process. What was the impact?
questions.tip: Quantify improvements (time saved, cost reduced, efficiency gained).

questions.question: Describe a time you received critical feedback. How did you handle it?
questions.tip: Focus on growth mindset and concrete actions taken.
